retry_reason: The put (dev_kfree_skb) occurs only on command send failure and is irreversible; retrying would require a new skb allocation, not a redo of the put.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to build and send a WMI VDEV install key command, not reference count management. skb allocation/free is incidental network buffer handling, not the core logic.
